Source: Copilot Studio What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-copilot-studio/whats-new
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Copilot Studio What's New

## March 2026
- (Preview) Work IQ tools connecting Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents to Work IQ service for real-time work insights from M365 files, emails, meetings, chats

## February 2026
- Improved agent responses for ticket-based Microsoft 365 Graph connectors (ServiceNow, Azure DevOps)
- Claude Sonnet 4.5 (beta) available for Computer Use agents — improves nuanced decision-making
- Prompt builder enhancements:
  - Content moderation sensitivity per prompt (hate/fairness, sexual, violence, self-harm)
  - Claude Opus 4.6 and Claude Sonnet 4.5 model selection for prompts
  - Inline editing of prompt instructions and settings in agent tool details

## January 2026
- Agent evaluations enhancements (Preview):
  - Thumbs-up/down feedback on evaluation results
  - Activity maps for sequence of inputs/decisions/outputs
  - CSV template for test set creation
- Computer use expansions (Preview): new model support, built-in credentials, enhanced audit logging with session replay, Cloud PC pooling
- VS Code extension GA for building/editing agents (Microsoft Copilot Studio extension for Visual Studio Code)

## December 2025
- Compare multiple agent versions side by side for evaluation

## November 2025
- GPT-5 Chat GA for European and US regions (rolled out November 24, 2025)
- Microsoft Entra agent identities (Preview) — automatic creation for agents
- Improved SharePoint knowledge retrieval with tenant graph grounding
- SharePoint metadata filters for knowledge retrieval (filename, owner, modified date)
- Multi-agent orchestration including Microsoft Fabric data agents
- Tool groups for faster agent setup (Outlook and SharePoint connectors)
- Copy agents from M365 Copilot to Copilot Studio
- Request for information action (Preview) — pause flow to collect reviewer input via Outlook
- Updated Power Platform API calls to use new 'copilotstudio' namespace
- Component collections enhancements (sidebar access, MCP connector support)

## October 2025
- GPT-4o retired (Oct 27-31), GPT-4.1 new default model
- Multiple AI model selection available
- GPT-5 models (Preview) for testing
- Copilot Studio Kit for testing custom agents (Power CAT)
- Themes analytics (Preview) — group related questions
- Time and cost savings tracking for autonomous and conversational agents
- Unified activity and transcript view with pin sessions and feedback
- MCP server support for dynamic real-time content
- Agent evaluation with customizable test sets (Preview)

## September 2025
- Computer-Using Agents (CUA) Preview — automate desktop application tasks
- Client SDK for Android, iOS, and Windows native app embedding
- Code interpreter for Excel/CSV/PDF file analysis in chat (Preview)

## August 2025
- Code interpreter GA
- File groups GA
- File and image upload support for agent analysis
- Generated answer rate and quality analytics GA
- MCP server guided onboarding wizard

## July 2025
- Advanced NLU customization
- In-app search across agent knowledge/topics/tools/skills/entities
- ROI analytics for autonomous agents
- MIP sensitivity labels (Preview)
- WhatsApp channel support
- SSO Consent Card (Preview)

## June 2025
- Improved tools experience with grouping/filtering
- M365 Copilot Tuning support (Preview)
- Actionable insights for unanswered questions by theme
- Power Fx formulas in prompt builder editor
- Regular expression support for Power Fx (IsMatch, Match, MatchAll)
- File groups as knowledge sources (Preview)
- Generative orchestration for all supported languages (Preview)
- Redesigned Channels page
- GPT-4.1 mini experimental response model (US-only preview)

Last updated: 2026-03-09
